summary: Comprehensive testing of new Power BI Report Designer features: Copy/Paste, Alignment tools, Title editing, and Keyboard shortcuts. All features working correctly with 100% success rate.
passed_tests: Copy element: toolbar button copies selected element with toast notification
Paste element: toolbar button pastes copied element with offset (X+30, Y+30) and '(copia)' suffix
Delete element: toolbar button removes selected element with toast notification
Align Left: positions element at X=40 (left margin)
Align Center: centers element horizontally on canvas
Align Right: positions element at X=canvasWidth-elementWidth-40
Align Top: positions element at Y=40 (top margin)
Align Middle: centers element vertically on canvas
Align Bottom: positions element at Y=canvasHeight-elementHeight-40
Edit title: prominent input in properties panel updates element label in real-time
Ctrl+C keyboard shortcut: copies selected element
Ctrl+V keyboard shortcut: pastes element from clipboard
Delete key shortcut: removes selected element
Ctrl+Z keyboard shortcut: undo last action
Ctrl+Y keyboard shortcut: redo action
Properties Panel Copy button: copies element to clipboard
Properties Panel Duplicate button: creates duplicate with offset
Properties Panel Delete button: removes element
Properties Panel Alignment buttons: all 6 alignment buttons functional
Toolbar buttons have correct disabled states when no element selected
All toast notifications display correctly (copiado, pegado, eliminado, duplicado)
critical_code_review_comments: Code review passed - all features implemented correctly
Keyboard shortcuts properly ignore input fields (e.target.tagName check)
Copy/paste uses clipboard state in Zustand store correctly
Alignment logic uses proper margin offsets (40px)
Title input has prominent styling with gradient background for visibility
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) Copy/paste with Ctrl+C/V and toolbar buttons, 2) Alignment with 6 directional buttons (left/center/right/top/middle/bottom), 3) Title editing in properties panel with prominent styling, 4) Delete with Delete key and toolbar button, 5) Undo/Redo with Ctrl+Z/Y. Use 'Layout Simple' template for testing.
